prompt:
Create a 9:16 vertical Instagram Story announcement in 4K — CACTUS CLOUDS is now stocking MUHA MEDS products. Direction: 'MAINSTAGE SPOTLIGHT' — minimal, premium, dramatic, EDC mainstage moment rendered like a luxury boutique drop. Less is more. Cinematic, high-end, breath room.

=== COMPOSITION (top-to-bottom) ===

TOP (~12% of frame): the CACTUS CLOUDS logo rendered FAITHFULLY from the FIRST reference image (white cursive 'Cactus clouds' with green outline, small white clouds and green saguaro motif, butterfly accent). Centered, sitting on clean negative space. Subtle soft white halo.

UPPER-MIDDLE (~8% of frame): a single clean headline 'NOW STOCKED AT CACTUS CLOUDS' broken across two centered lines — 'NOW STOCKED AT' (smaller, thin all-caps tracked sans-serif, in warm white) and 'CACTUS CLOUDS' (larger, BOLD condensed display sans-serif in gold-leaf gradient, thin gold rim). Clean, restrained, editorial — not arcade-marquee.

CENTER HERO (~35% of frame): the GOLD MUHA MEDS 'MM' emblem (FAITHFULLY from the SECOND reference image — ornate interlocking M gothic monogram in gold) centered, BIG, treated as the headlining act under a single dramatic mainstage spotlight. Behind the emblem: ONE clean concentric ring of gold light (single thin ring, not a busy mandala). Two slim diagonal gold spotlight beams angle down from the upper corners and converge on the emblem (mainstage spotlight effect). Soft volumetric haze in the spotlight cones. NO daisies behind the emblem. NO multicolor laser explosion. Just gold light on midnight black.

LOWER-CENTER (~30% of frame): the three MUHA MEDS product boxes arranged on a clean elevated WHITE-MARBLE-LIT pedestal slab (glossy reflective surface, soft top-down spotlight on the slab). Arrangement: FROZEN POMEGRANATE on the LEFT (THIRD reference image), BLUE SLUSHIE in the CENTER and slightly forward / largest (FOURTH reference image), GALACTIC DIESEL on the RIGHT (FIFTH reference image). Each box rendered FAITHFULLY from its ref. CRITICAL: ONLY THE BOXES — NO vape pens, NO cartridges, NO devices of any kind. Each box has a clean soft mirror reflection on the pedestal surface and a thin warm gold rim-light tracing the box edges. The boxes are the only saturated color elements in the lower half.

LOWER-BOTTOM (~10%): a single thin horizontal gold hairline, then small clean text centered: 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+' in tracked white all-caps. Below that, a compact lockup: small Cactus Clouds logo on the left, a thin gold 'X' in the middle, small gold MM emblem on the right. Generous breathing space.

=== STYLE & PALETTE ===
Background: deep midnight BLACK with a subtle warm dark-navy gradient. ONE column of soft warm gold uplight rising from behind the pedestal, fading off before the headline. NO city skyline silhouette. NO ferris wheel. NO daisies. NO laser fan. NO confetti. Just spotlight + emblem + boxes + clean type.
Palette (TIGHT — only these): rich warm gold (dominant), pure white (type + reflections), deep midnight black (background), and a tiny touch of the Cactus Clouds green ONLY in the Cactus Clouds wordmark itself. NO pink, NO cyan, NO violet, NO acid green, NO yellow except the gold.
Lighting: a single dramatic mainstage spotlight on the emblem, a softer top-down spot on the pedestal, gentle volumetric haze, soft lens flare on the emblem center, faint film grain. Boutique-luxe.
Finish: premium, restrained, expensive — feel like a Cartier holiday campaign crossed with a Vegas mainstage moment.

=== STRICT RULES ===
- ONLY THE BOXES from the three product references. NO devices anywhere.
- Preserve Cactus Clouds wordmark and Muha Meds emblem EXACTLY as in refs.
- Spelling: 'CACTUS CLOUDS', 'MUHA MEDS', 'NOW STOCKED AT', 'AVAILABLE NOW  ·  21+', 'BLUE SLUSHIE', 'FROZEN POMEGRANATE', 'GALACTIC DIESEL'. No 'LIMITED DROP' anywhere.
- 9:16 portrait, full-bleed, no border. Premium poster-grade execution.
